compiled_state.title: Update REVIEW-WORKFLOW-HUGE.md confirmed-refactor branch with batch-groups dispatch and anomaly agent (efe7-7f1d T5)
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Story
efe7-7f1d — Batch-group dispatch for large-refactor conformance checking

## Testing Mode
GREEN — implements behavior verified by T3 tests

## Depends on
T2 (c364-6fdf) — review-batch-groups.sh must exist
T3 (5275-a50f) — tests must be RED first
T4 (1c39-3af4) — anomaly agent must exist

## What
Update the confirmed-refactor branch in `plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW-HUGE.md`
to add the full haiku batch conformance sweep + anomaly review dispatch.

## Steps the workflow must describe

### Step 4a: Read MAX_AGENTS from config
```bash
MAX_AGENTS=$(bash "$PLUGIN_SCRIPTS/read-config.sh" orchestration.max_agents)
MAX_AGENTS="${MAX_AGENTS:-4}"
```

### Step 4b: Get non-sampled files and batch them
- Identify the non-sampled files (all changed files minus the stratified sample already reviewed)
- Pipe the non-sampled file list to review-batch-groups.sh via the dso shim:
  ```bash
  GROUPS=$(echo "$NON_SAMPLED_FILES" | MAX_AGENTS="$MAX_AGENTS" .claude/scripts/dso review-batch-groups)
  ```
  (Note: shim invocation, no .sh suffix)

### Step 4c: Dispatch haiku sub-agents per group for conformance check
- For each GROUP_N line in $GROUPS, dispatch a haiku sub-agent with the files in that group
- Each haiku agent checks whether each file conforms to the patterns established in the sample
- Collect any `ANOMALOUS: <filename>` lines from haiku responses into ANOMALOUS_FILES list
- On haiku sub-agent timeout: add all files in that group to ANOMALOUS_FILES (conservative)

### Step 4d: Capture anomalous-file diffs and dispatch anomaly reviewer
If ANOMALOUS_FILES is non-empty:
- Capture diffs for anomalous files to a temp file:
  ```bash
  DIFF_FILE_PATH=$(mktemp /tmp/huge-diff-anomaly-XXXXXX.patch)
  git diff HEAD~1 -- $ANOMALOUS_FILES > "$DIFF_FILE_PATH"
  ```
- Dispatch `dso:huge-diff-refactor-anomaly` sub-agent with explicit DIFF_FILE_PATH and REPO_ROOT in the prompt:
  ```
  Dispatch prompt must include:
    REPO_ROOT=<absolute path>
    DIFF_FILE_PATH=<path to temp patch file>
    List of anomalous files: <ANOMALOUS_FILES>
  ```
- On anomaly reviewer timeout → set `REVIEW_RESULT: failed`

### Step 4e: Finalize
- If anomaly reviewer returns no critical findings → REVIEW_RESULT: passed
- Clean up temp DIFF_FILE_PATH

## Verification
After updating the file:
- `grep 'review-batch-groups' plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW-HUGE.md` → exits 0
- `grep 'huge-diff-refactor-anomaly' plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW-HUGE.md` → exits 0
- T3 tests `test_huge_confirmed_haiku_batch_references_batch_groups` and `test_huge_confirmed_references_anomaly_agent` → PASS
